Repeatable to: 3 credits.

KNES689 Special Problems in Kinesiology (1-6 Credits)

Master or doctoral candidates who desire to pursue special research problems under the direction of their advisor may register for 1-6 hours of credit under this number.

KNES691 Muscular Aspects of Exercise Physiology (3 Credits) Skeletal muscle structure and function including muscle development, excitation-contraction coupling, muscle fiber types and fatigue, muscle biochemistry, gene expression, muscle damage and regeneration. The effects of aging and exercise training on skeletal muscle.
